metadata.name: ww-input-mask
metadata.description: A masked text input that enforces a formatting pattern on user input (phone numbers, dates, postal codes, card numbers, etc.) using the iMask library. Inherits from ww-text and integrates with ww-form-container for form submission and validation.
features: Form validation and submission support when placed inside ww-form-container
Supports multiple underlying input types (text, email, password, number, tel, url, textarea, decimal)
Exposes both masked value and raw (unmasked) value

properties.name: placeholderColor
properties.description: Color of the placeholder text. Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is true.

properties.name: advancedPlaceholder
properties.description: Enable the advanced floating-label placeholder behavior (animated placeholder that scales/repositions on focus or input).

properties.name: forceAnimation
properties.description: Force the advanced placeholder animation to play continuously, regardless of input/focus state. Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is false.

properties.name: animationTrigger
properties.description: What triggers the advanced placeholder animation. 'focus' = on input focus; 'input' = on first character. Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is false.

properties.name: placeholderPosition
properties.description: Where the advanced placeholder lands once active. 'inside' stays inside the field; 'outside' floats above. Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is false.

properties.name: placeholderScaling
properties.description: Scale factor (0-1) applied to the advanced placeholder when active. Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is false.

properties.name: positioningAjustment
properties.description: Pixel offset adjustment for the active position of the advanced placeholder (e.g. '0px', '4px'). Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is false.

properties.name: transition
properties.description: Duration (in ms) of the advanced placeholder animation (e.g. '400ms'). Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is false.

properties.name: timingFunction
properties.description: CSS timing function for the advanced placeholder animation. Inactive when advancedPlaceholder is false.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Initial value of the input.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Whether the input is read-only.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Whether the input is required for form validation to pass.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty. Supports multi-language object.

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Number of rows for textarea type. Only applies when type is 'textarea'. Inactive when type is not 'textarea'.

properties.name: resize
properties.description: Allow textarea resize. Only applies when type is 'textarea'. Inactive when type is not 'textarea'.

properties.name: min
properties.description: Minimum value for number type. Only applies when type is 'number'. Inactive when type is not 'number'.

properties.name: max
properties.description: Maximum value for number type. Only applies when type is 'number'. Inactive when type is not 'number'.

properties.name: hideArrows
properties.description: Hide number input arrows. Only applies when type is 'number'. Inactive when type is not 'number'.

properties.name: debounce
properties.description: Enable debounce on value changes.

properties.name: debounceDelay
properties.description: Debounce delay (1-5000ms). Only applies when debounce is true. Inactive when debounce is false.

properties.name: pattern
properties.description: The iMask pattern string enforced on the input. Uses iMask syntax: '0' any digit, 'a' any letter, '*' any char, '[]' optional segment, '{}' fixed part included in the unmasked value. Examples: '{+1} (000) 000-0000', '0000 0000 0000 0000', '00/00/0000'.

properties.name: placeholderVisible
properties.description: Whether to display the mask placeholder characters inline while the user is typing.

properties.name: placeholderChar
properties.description: Character used for unfilled mask slots when placeholderVisible is true. Inactive when placeholderVisible is not true.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when placeholderVisible is not true.

properties.name: fieldName
properties.description: Field name used for form data when inside a ww-form-container. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: customValidation
properties.description: Enable custom validation formula. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: validation
properties.description: Custom validation formula. Only applies when customValidation is true. Inactive when the element is not in a form container or when customValidation is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy) or when customValidation is false.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Underlying input type inherited from ww-text. Controls which of the type-gated properties apply.

states.name: focus
states.description: Active when the input has focus.

states.name: readonly
states.description: Active when the input is in read-only mode.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when the input value changes (after debounce if enabled).

events.name: initValueChange
events.description: Triggered when the bound initial value changes programmatically.

events.name: onEnterKey
events.description: Triggered when the Enter key is pressed while the input is focused.

events.name: characterAccept
events.description: Triggered when iMask accepts a character.

events.name: characterReject
events.description: Triggered when iMask rejects a character that does not match the pattern.

events.name: maskComplete
events.description: Triggered when the mask pattern is completely filled.

events.name: focus
events.description: Triggered when the input receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Triggered when the input loses focus.

variables.name: value
variables.description: The current masked value of the input (string for most types, number for 'number' and 'decimal' types).

variables.name: raw value
variables.description: The current unmasked (raw) value of the input, without fixed parts from the mask pattern.

specifications: Use ww-input-mask (not ww-input-basic) whenever the input needs to enforce a formatting pattern: phone numbers, dates, postal codes, credit card numbers, IBANs, social security numbers, etc.
When used as a form field, place the element inside a ww-form-container and set fieldName to the key used in the form payload.
The validation property only applies when customValidation is true.
The debounceDelay property only applies when debounce is true.
The type property selects the underlying HTML input mode and gates rows / resize (textarea) and min / max / hideArrows (number).
The pattern property uses iMask syntax. Common examples: US phone '{+1} (000) 000-0000', date '00/00/0000', credit card '0000 0000 0000 0000', postal code (US) '00000', postal code (CA) 'a0a 0a0'.
